macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Major US Indexes Trigger A+ Sell Signals Amid Risk-Off Environment
items.summary: SPY, QQQ, and DIA have triggered daily A+ sell signals with prices breaking below the 21 EMA and 50 SMA, confirming short-term trend damage. Weekly closes below the 21 EMA across major indexes signal a clear risk-off shift, with defensive sectors like Energy and Utilities showing strength.

items.title: FTSE 100 Suffers Sharpest Weekly Decline in 11 Months, Down 5.75%
items.summary: The FTSE 100 dropped 129 points to 10,284 on Friday, marking its worst weekly performance since April 2025 amid market turbulence. Global stocks weakened further due to spiking energy prices.

items.title: S&P 500 Declines 2% as Oil Prices Surge to $94 on US-Israel Attacks on Iran
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 2% in the first week of March following US and Israel strikes on Iran, with Brent crude hitting $94 per barrel—the highest since late 2022—due to fears of supply disruptions. Higher oil threatens inflation and could force the Fed to keep rates elevated longer.

items.title: Oil Prices Climb Above $93 Amid Iran Conflict and Gulf Supply Fears
items.summary: Crude prices surged past $93 per barrel on warnings of energy export disruptions from the Iran conflict, raising global inflation concerns. OPEC plans to increase output to cap prices threatening $100.

items.title: Upcoming High-Stakes Earnings for ORCL, ADBE, and Others with Major Volatility Expected
items.summary: Stocks like Oracle (ORCL) on March 10 and Adobe (ADBE) on March 12 are set for significant post-earnings moves, with implied volatility up to 11.74%. Traders advised on strategies amid recent VIX spike and recovery.

items.title: US Markets Show Mixed YTD Gains but High Valuations Signal Trump Bull Market End
items.summary: As of early March, Dow up 0.74% YTD, S&P 500 up 0.16%, Nasdaq lagging; Shiller CAPE at 40.02 indicates second-priciest market ever. Post-Trump inauguration gains of 12-16% may reverse amid oil shocks.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Kraken Becomes First Crypto Firm to Access Federal Reserve's Payment Rails
items.summary: On March 4, 2026, the Federal Reserve Bank of Kansas City approved a limited purpose master account for Kraken Financial, making it the first digital asset firm to gain direct access to Fedwire for settling US dollar transactions without intermediary banks.

items.title: Bitcoin Loses $110 Billion in Market Cap Amid Iran-Related Dollar Strength
items.summary: Despite major institutional adoption news, Bitcoin lost approximately $110 billion in market capitalization during the week of March 4, 2026, driven by dollar strengthening following escalating US-Iran conflict concerns and President Trump's rejection of negotiated settlement.

items.title: Stablecoin Transaction Volumes Hit Record High at $1.8 Trillion Monthly
items.summary: Stablecoin transaction volumes reached an all-time high of $1.8 trillion in a single month, with USDC showing accelerated growth outpacing overall stablecoin market expansion.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Large AI Models Accelerate Catalyst Discovery by Predicting Performance Pre-Synthesis
items.summary: Researchers at Tohoku University demonstrate how large AI models, including universal machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) and large language models (LLMs), enable rapid catalyst discovery by simulating atomic interactions and analyzing literature before lab synthesis, potentially revolutionizing materials science for fuel cells and hydrogen production.

items.title: AI Revolutionizes Software Development with Key Trends in Testing and Decision Intelligence
items.summary: AI is transforming software testing by automating regression tests and predicting failures, with 70% of developers prioritizing it despite capability gaps; meanwhile, Gartner's new Magic Quadrant highlights Decision Intelligence Platforms (DIPs) shifting from data-driven to decision-centric AI for faster business decisions.

items.title: IMF Warns of Impending AI Tsunami Displacing Jobs and Widening Inequality
items.summary: A column warns of an AI and robotics 'tsunami' poised to automate jobs within 3-10 years, with tech giants investing $500B+ in data centers; IMF recommends social safety nets and retraining amid risks of income inequality and the approach of AI singularity by 2045.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xbox Confirms 'Project Helix' Next-Gen Console with PC Game Compatibility
items.summary: Microsoft has confirmed 'Project Helix', its next-generation Xbox console that will also play PC games, signaling a future for console hardware amid RAM shortages.

items.title: NVIDIA Reportedly Planning GeForce RTX 5050 with 9GB Memory
items.summary: NVIDIA is said to be developing an RTX 5050 GPU with 9GB memory and a 96-bit bus, alongside potential restocks of the RTX 3060 starting mid-March 2026.

items.title: World Video Game Hall of Fame 2026 Finalists Announced
items.summary: The Strong National Museum of Play revealed 12 finalists including Angry Birds, Skyrim, League of Legends, and Silent Hill; public voting runs March 5-13 with inductees announced May 7.

items.title: Fortnite Wild Weeks Power Hour Event Launches March 8
items.summary: Fortnite's Wild Weeks Power Hour event starts at 10:00 AM ET on March 8, 2026, earlier than the previous day's event.

items.title: Auntie Atom: The Final Harvest Roblox Horror Game Sets 2026 Release
items.summary: The industrial survival horror game Auntie Atom: The Final Harvest on Roblox announces its official 2026 launch date.

items.title: Video Game Stocks to Watch: Turtle Beach, Motorsport Games Lead Trading
items.summary: MarketBeat highlights Turtle Beach, Motorsport Games, Alliance Entertainment, Allied Gaming, and Brag House as top video game stocks by recent trading volume on March 7.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
